Verified as standard OpenMRS administration interface path; confirmed in OpenMRS documentation (https://guide.openmrs.org/configuration/configuring-visits/), and consistent with setup_task.sh and task_utils.sh which establish BAHMNI_BASE_URL='https://localhost' and OPENMRS_BASE_URL='${BAHMNI_BASE_URL}/openmrs'

Verified through OpenMRS REST API documentation at https://rest.openmrs.org/ confirming endpoint /openmrs/ws/rest/v1/visittype for managing visit types; also verified in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which use '${OPENMRS_API_URL}/visittype'

privileged_info_summary: This is a system administration task for creating a visit type in an OpenMRS/Bahmni EMR system. The task requires creating a new visit type named 'Telehealth Consultation' with the description 'Remote patient consultation conducted via video or phone call' through the OpenMRS administration interface at https://localhost/openmrs/admin using default admin credentials (username: superman). The API endpoint for visit types is /visittype. Bahmni is a real, open-source healthcare EMR system built on OpenMRS and used in over 50 countries. The visit type being created is synthetic data generated by the task, not extracted from an external source.
